content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event Type & Context**: This is a PR review request for PR #154 that adds a new AI-assisted review of P. putida KT2440 gene ttgB GO annotations. The PR is part of the P_PUTIDA project and contains 8700 additions, 6509 deletions across 18 files.

b. **Request Type**: This is explicitly a code review request. The user wants feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security concerns, and test coverage.

c. **Key Information**:
   - New gene review files for PSEPK/ttgB including AI review YAML, deep research, notes, UniProt/GOA data
   - Multiple publication cache files added
   - Large update to GO terms cache
   - Files follow the established gene review project structure

d. **Main Tasks**:
   - Read and analyze the new gene review files
   - Check YAML schema compliance and structure
   - Review the AI annotation decisions and rationale
   - Assess file organization and naming conventions
   - Look for potential issues in data handling or curation decisions

e. **Plan**:
   1. Read the main AI review YAML file to understand the annotation decisions
   2. Check notes and deep research files for quality and completeness
   3. Validate against project guidelines in CLAUDE.md
   4. Review publication files for proper formatting
   5. Check for any schema validation issues
   6. Provide comprehensive feedback on the gene review quality

f. **Limitations**: I should be able to complete this review fully by reading the files and providing feedback through the comment update tool.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: PSEPK ttgB GO Annotations Reviewing this AI-assisted gene annotation review for *P. putida* KT2440 **ttgB**. #### Todo List - [ ] Read and analyze main AI review YAML file - [ ] Review gene notes and deep research quality - [ ] Check publication files and citations - [ ] Validate against project guidelines and schema - [ ] Assess annotation curation decisions - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23372188915)
